data.title: Bitcoin Price Forms Descending Triangle Pattern Amid Israel-Iran Tensions
data.description:
The recent escalation in tensions between Israel and Iran has added a new wave of anxiety in the global markets, causing investors to adopt a more cautious stance towards investing. At the same time, Bitcoin’s technical chart is sending mixed signals that could lead to a breakout in either direction. After a failed attempt to reclaim $110,000 earlier this week, the price has now slipped below the 21-day moving average, but still above support at the 50-day moving average. This confluence of moving averages, coupled with a clearly defined trendline resistance, has brought Bitcoin into a tightening price structure of a descending triangle pattern
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-price-forms-descending-triangle-pattern-amid-israel-iran-tensions/

data.title: Iran launches retaliatory airstrikes on Israel for second night
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that on the evening of June 14th local time, early morning Beijing time today (June 15th), Iran’s state television reported that Iran launched a new round of missile attacks on Israel. Missiles have been launched from Tehran into Israel. Iran launched drones and ballistic missiles in response to Israel’s previous attacks, and the missile targets were Tel Aviv, Haifa and other places in Israel. Jordan’s air defense alarm sounded on the evening of the 14th, and it was suspected that a flying object flew over Jordanian airspace. The Israeli military also issued a statement saying that the defense system has been activated in Israel, and air defense alarms have been sounded in many places in the country, requiring the country’s citizens to enter safe shelters until further notice. (Jinshi)

data.title: Decentralized Exchange Volume Surges by 460% Over Two Years
data.description: According to PANews, data from Token Terminal reveals significant growth in the decentralized finance sector over the past two years. Since June 2023, decentralized exchange (DEX) trading volumes have increased by 460%. Additionally, active loans have seen a 357% rise, while the supply of stablecoins has grown by 83%. This data highlights the rapid expansion and adoption of decentralized financial services in recent years.

data.title: Aura's market value exceeds 240 million US dollars, setting a new record high
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to GMGN market data, the market value of the Meme coin aura on the Solana chain has suddenly reached 240 million US dollars, a record high, with a 24-hour increase of 30.76%, and the market value is now reported at 223 million US dollars.
Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins fluctuates greatly, and investors should pay attention to risks.

data.title: Trader AguilaTrades Opens $200 Million Bitcoin Long Position
data.description: According to PANews, on-chain analyst Yu Jin reported that trader AguilaTrades has opened a new long position in Bitcoin valued at $200 million. The position involves 1,894 BTC with a 20x leverage, an entry price of $104,976, and a liquidation price of $97,265. Currently, the position shows an unrealized profit of approximately $910,000. Previously, AguilaTrades opened a Bitcoin long position on June 9, which was closed on June 13 with a loss of $12.48 million.

data.title: AguilaTrades uses 20x leverage to open a $200 million BTC long position
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @EmberCN monitoring, trader AguilaTrades opened a long position in Bitcoin again this morning. He has established a 20x leveraged long order, holding 1,894 BTC, with a position value of approximately US$200 million, an opening price of US$104,976, a liquidation price of US$97,265, and a current floating profit of approximately US$910,000.
He had previously opened a long position in BTC on June 9 and closed the position on June 13 with a stop loss of US$12.48 million. He re-entered the market after a two-day break.

data.title: Coatue founder: Bitcoin volatility is decreasing and will become a core asset in investment portfolios
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Philippe Laffont, founder of Coatue Management, said that although the high volatility of Bitcoin in the early days made him wait and see about crypto assets, Bitcoin is now gradually maturing with the participation of institutional investors. He pointed out that as Bitcoin's volatility decreases and market awareness increases, its position in the investment portfolio will become "more important" and is expected to become one of the core configuration assets.

data.title: Circle CEO: Stablecoins may be the most practical form of currency, and the "iPhone moment" has not yet arrived
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Circle co-founder and CEO Jeremy Allaire recently posted on the X platform that stablecoins may be the most practical form of currency in history, but the entire industry has not yet reached a critical node similar to the "iPhone moment". He pointed out that once the stablecoin industry enters this stage, developers will be able to unlock programmable digital dollars like unlocking programmable mobile phones. At that time, digital dollars will unleash huge potential on the Internet and bring extensive opportunities. He believes that this era may not be far away.

data.title: FSB Chair Warns of Potential Systemic Risks in Cryptocurrency Markets
data.description:
According to PANews, Klaas Knot, the outgoing chairman of the Financial Stability Board (FSB), has issued a stern warning about the cryptocurrency market, suggesting it may be nearing a 'critical point' that could pose systemic risks to the global financial system. Knot highlighted the significant holdings of U.S. Treasury bonds by stablecoin issuers, emphasizing the need for close monitoring of this sector.

He noted that the barriers for retail investors have significantly lowered, particularly following the introduction of cryptocurrency ETFs, which has strengthened ties with the traditional financial system. Knot underscored the necessity for proactive regulation, stating, 'The crypto ecosystem will continue to evolve, and our regulatory framework must do the same.'

data.title: Shopify x CoinBase φέρνουν το USDC στο καλάθι αγορών
data.description:
Φαντάσου να μπορείς να πληρώνεις για τις online αγορές σου με ένα ψηφιακό δολάριο που παραμένει πάντα σταθερό στην αξία του, χωρίς επιπλέον χρεώσεις, καθυστερήσεις ή μετατροπές νομισμάτων. Αυτό ακριβώς έρχεται να κάνει η Shopify από τις 12 Ιουνίου 2025, συνεργαζόμενη με την Coinbase για να φέρει το stablecoin USDC στον βωμό του παγκόσμιου ηλεκτρονικού εμπορίου. Η αρχή θα γίνει σε ένα περιορισμένο αριθμό ατόμων, αλλά σύντομα εκατομμύρια καταστήματα που χρησιμοποιούν το Shopify Payments θα μπορούν να δέχονται USDC μέσω του Base του γρήγορου, φθηνού και ασφαλούς δικτύου της Coinbase πάνω στο Ethereum. Στόχος; Πιο απλές, πιο οικονομικές και πιο παγκόσμιες πληρωμές με τη δύναμη των crypto
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/shopify-coinbase-fernoun-to-usdc/
